content.en:
The Heavenly Pavilion is now settled in the Holy City, and the security issue is absolutely reliable.

The last Ghost Gate incident was a special event, but even so, the strong people of the underworld did not break through the Holy City, so you can imagine how much attention the Terran attaches to the Holy City.

Once the Holy City has been breached, it means that the end of the human race has come!

Therefore, when Tiange settled in the Holy City, Ye Tian was very happy in his heart, and he was also completely assured of the safety of his wife, sister and others.

And at this moment, the Supremes of the twelve cosmic epochs started a meeting.

This time the meeting was held in the salon star field!

The Sharon Star Domain is a star field of the Sand Clan, the Great Clan of the Universe, and is now divided into the forces of the Twelve Cosmic Eras.

Now, the forces of the twelve cosmic epochs have basically divided these star fields, and are developing these star fields.

However, some things were still not taken care of, so this meeting began.

......

meeting.

The Lord of the Yuan Gu said: "This time, we have won 100 star fields, which is enough in a short time, but it may not be enough in the future. However, for the time being, we can't really fight with the races of this cosmic era, they don't understand us after all, and we are still suppressed by the origin of the universe, and it is not suitable for a full-scale war, as long as some years are passed, even if we are steadily integrated into this cosmic era, the final plan can be launched!"

"Can the plan really succeed? Detachment is that easy?"

The Immortal Venerable Lord frowned, he seemed to be a little unconvinced.

At this time, the Lord of the Ancient Dynasty said coldly: "Lord of the Immortal Heaven, are you questioning the plan of that existence? If it weren't for that one, would we have survived the great destruction of the universe? Now that we have reappeared in this era of the universe, this proves that the plan can be successful! Moreover, this is also our only chance, if we can't transcend it again, then we will never be able to transcend it." Hmph, if this kind of demoralization is hit, I hope that the Lord of the Underworld will not say it again in the future, otherwise don't blame me for being unkind. Moreover, we could have obtained 200 star fields, and it was all your fault for interfering in the duel. Fortunately, this matter has little impact on the plan, otherwise even if I would have let you go, the other Supremes would not have let you go!"

The Immortal Venerable took care of the loss, did not dare to refute, lowered his head and stopped talking.

The Golden Light Supreme of the Golden God Clan said: "Lord of the Ancient Age, this plan is not something that can be completed in one moment, and we need a certain amount of luck, the development of the race is a must, the number of those sons of the era, the number of Supreme Highnesses is too small, we need to recreate our race, and let the sons of the era, Once they really grow up, they will become supreme in this universe era, which is more suitable for this universe, and their strength is definitely not weaker than ours, which is also good for our plans!"

"This is natural, but we also have to join forces, and try not to reveal a little secret, otherwise it will not be good if it is known by all races in the universe, and it may affect our plans!" said the Lord of the Ancient Age.

"That's for sure!"

The Supremes nodded.

"By the way, you must also keep it a secret from those sons of the era and the Supreme Highnesses, this plan cannot be known to them, although they are on our side, but once they are captured by the masters of this universe era, they may leak our secrets, and this risk cannot be taken!"

"Understood!"

The Supremes agreed.

Then the Supremes dispersed.

In the next few hundred years, the universe was surprisingly calm, and even the various races in the universe had almost no wars, all races were developing their own strength, and even those supreme beings were in retreat, trying to improve their strength.

The forces of the Twelve Cosmic Epochs maintain a state of non-interference with each other with the cosmic races of the current Cosmic Era, but everyone knows very well that this equilibrium state can only last for a maximum of 100,000 years.

Once 100,000 years have passed, perhaps war will come.

And is 100,000 years long?

Not long!

For those Supremes, 100,000 years is just a long-term retreat, and it is difficult to improve any strength at all.

The races of the universe also knew that the forces of these twelve cosmic epochs were dragging out time, but they knew that they did not dare to take the lead in attacking, because the consequences would be unbearable for any race.

The Protoss didn't dare to take the lead in attacking, how could the other universe clans dare?

But the races of the universe did not give up their actions, they secretly investigated why the forces of the twelve cosmic epochs were able to survive to the current era, what is the purpose?

Moreover, the forces of these twelve cosmic epochs appeared almost at the same time, how can the forces of the twelve cosmic epochs, which were almost not connected, be connected with each other and born together?

What's the secret?

These are all questions that all races in the universe want to know now!

this day.

The Kunwu Supreme entered the Holy City and secretly met with Ye Tian.

This is also the first time that the Supreme Kunwu has taken the initiative to see Ye Tian.

In the past, the Kunwu Supreme had sent someone to summon Ye Tian and let Ye Tian go to the Kunwu Palace, but this time it changed.

Ye Tian saw the Kunwu Supreme and said in surprise: "Ye Tian has seen the Kunwu Supreme, I don't know why the Kunwu Supreme is visiting?"

Kunwu Supreme sat down and said, "There is a big matter, but because it is relatively special, I came to meet secretly so as not to leak out the information! In order to verify my identity, I will tell you some things about meeting you in the past!"

Immediately, the Kunwu Supreme said his own thing, making Ye Tian convinced that he was the Kunwu Supreme.

"Kunwu Supreme, you are ......"

Ye Tian was a little puzzled.

"It's to guard against the supremes of the twelve universe eras, in case there is a supreme who is proficient in disguise and secretly disguises himself as me, it will be troublesome, and my coming to you this time is also related to the forces of the twelve universe eras. Not long ago, the supremes of the Protoss, the Demon Race, and a few cosmic clans secretly summoned a meeting, and our human race also went to several supremes. The result of the meeting was to lure those Sons of the Era into taking the bait, and then let you capture one or two Sons of the Epoch, trying to get some information from those Sons of the Age! The Protoss, the Demons, and the other great races of the universe don't want to wait until 100,000 years later, when the situation is too complicated, and no one knows what will happen at that time. Therefore, we must know the information and plans of the twelve cosmic epochs as soon as possible. "Kunwu Supreme Dao.

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood, but frowned again: "Kunwu Supreme, how could those sons of the era be so easily fooled?"

"If there's an opportunity they can't refuse, I'm sure they'll be fooled!"

Kunwu Supreme said with a smile.

"What chance?"

Ye Tian was also curious.
